title: samanea polycephala
intro: Samanea polycephala, also known as the multibristle samanea or multibristle neem, is a plant species native to various tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of compounds like samanin and samanone. The health benefits of Samanea polycephala include relief from fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as potential antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Samanea polycephala include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
